An '''order comm''' was an old-fashioned voice-recording device that was usually mounted to a person's belt. It was mainly used in restaurants for waiters to dictate their client's order. The recording was stored in the central unit and then transmitted to a remote receiver, usually located in the kitchen. The waiter would speak into a recording stylus that was attached to the central unit with a retaining cord.

[[Hermione Bagwa/Legends|Hermione Bagwa]] used an order comm in [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]]. She attached the central unit to her belt, and placed the recording stylus in a garter on her thigh.

==Appearances==
*{{Film|II}} {{1st}}
